feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Datasphere
feed.subtitle: SAP Datasphere Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Datsphere VS BW4HANA
entry.content:
Can someone share information about pros and cons of BW4HANA and Datasphere ?

As lot of companies have already switched to BW4HANA and long-term strategy from SAP is to consider Datasphere, trying to understand how both technology complements each other and some of the pros/cons of these technologies.

Thanks!

entry.title: Distribute the Monthly data across days in Datasphere..
entry.content:
Hi ,i have one file which is having the Values by Months ( data at the end of each month) . i need distribute these values by Days for each month ( as show in Output). how to achieve this in Datasphere Graphical View.

"Just to Add , We have Activated the Time Dimension in the Space. "

entry.title: Restricting data based on nodes of Hierarchy with directory
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We recently encountered a need to create calculated measures based on hierarchy nodes.

For instance, I would like to create a calculated measure for Promotional Incentives withing Total Revenue, specifically focusing on restricting the data related to Promotional Incentives. I would appreciate any thoughts or suggestions on how to accomplish this.

 Thank you in advance for your help!

SAP Datasphere

entry.title: Help Needed to Integrate Geographical Map in SAP Story
entry.content:
Hi community,

I am working on a story in SAP that consumes data from a model based on a graphical view in Datasphere. I would like to incorporate a geographical map to better visualize the information, but I can’t find how to create the location dimension.

Could someone guide me on how to integrate a geographical map into my story? I appreciate any advice or resources you can share.

Thank you very much in advance!

entry.title: How does SAP want me to connect more than one fact model?
entry.content:
Let's think of a very common scenario. You have

1. Sales value

2. Stock value

You want to analyse sales vs stock value of a product. You need to combine those two facts.

From what I see you have the following sitation

1. Analytic model does not support more than one fact model and I can see no reference that this feature is being worked on

2. Business builder is abandoned

3. Blending models in SAC is not supported and I can see no reference that this feature is being worked on

Am I missing something here?

Sure you can aggregate the data based and create another analytics model but then you lose a lot of the granularity that you might need. I honestly don't understand how such essential features are not supported when the competition has been supporting this for years!

I feel like a fool when business users ask me completly understanable questions when they want to see different fact measures aggregated per customer, product and so on and I have to tell them that this is not possible with this quite expensive product.

entry.title: Local datasphere table occupying space without records
entry.content:
Hello Datasphere experts

I have a problem where a local Datasphere table is taking up space on my disk but has no records.

I try to delete the records but the system won't let me because it tells me it has no memory. If I try to delete the table directly, the system collapses by CPU, consuming 210% of the CPU.

Previously I had a table stuck in memory (not disk) and I was able to delete it by freeing the memory:

How can I delete this table permanently? It keeps taking up disk space and memory and I can't move forward.

Edit:
When I try to delete the table I get this error:

And the Datasphere memory monitor saturates:

Best regards!

entry.title: is it possible to pull the remote tables from oracle/ Gold DB to Datasphere using Replication flow ?
entry.content: Is there any way to pull the remote tables from Oracle DB / Gold DB to Datasphere using replication flows with Delta Capture?

entry.title: How to replicate end-routines and function modules from SAP BW4H to SAP Datasphere?
entry.content:
We have SAP ADSO created in SAP BW4H extracted from S4H. Some of the Dimensions have routines and standard function modules in end-routines and field level routines. How do we replicate this in SAP DS. Is there any migration tool or any blogs or any methods to replicate the SAP Standard function modules and custom ABAP routines in SAP DS ? 

 

For example, Convert date to FY Period. we have a standard FM where we can use in BW4H to convert date to FYP. How can we replicate that in SAP DS if we are building a new flow in SAP DS. Please advise.

 

Thanks

MP

entry.title: SAP DATASPHERE Introduction and Data Modeling
entry.content:
Hi guys!!!

I have started the journey to learn about SAC, But I'm at the very beginning and Im already having some issues..

for started I have noticed that the CSV file available in the downloads section is different that the one that shown in the example when we are uploading the table for the first time and then creating the view at the Introduction and Data Modeling part. 

After having that done, I have moved on to the part where we will do the first story but it seems I have done something wrong or there Is something wrong with interconnectivity between my space in Datasphere and the user in Sac-cloud as I don't have visible the files "meaning the view of the table"

 

I would be looking forward to hear from you 

thank you in Advance.

entry.title: Replication Flow Upsert Mode in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
There are two modes in the Replication Flow:

  1. Initial

  2. Initial & Delta

Due to the limitations of the source CDS view, we need to utilize the Initial Mode.

Refer to the doccument (SAP Datasphere > Replication Flow) 

The Truncate setting is relevant if the target structure already exists and contains data. Review the default setting and change it if required:

  • If Truncate is marked for a database table, when you start the replication run, the system deletes the table content, but leaves the table structure intact and fills it with the relevant data from the source.

    If not, the system inserts new data records after the existing data in the target. For data records that already exist in the target and have been changed in the source, the system updates the target records with the changed data from the source using the UPSERT mode.

Therefore, we will not choose the truncate option and will utilize the upsert mode instead.

The first initial execution duration was 9 minutes and 28 seconds.

The duration of the second execution was 9 minutes and 34 seconds.

I have a few questions regarding this result.

  1. Why did the duration of the second execution not decrease significantly compared to the first run?

  2. Why was the initial data executed again during the second execution? Shouldn't the upsert mode have been utilized to only process the changed data? I noticed that the removal state was executed before the initial state."

Removal state (Second execution)

 
initial state (Second execution)

entry.title: Issue Consuming OpenAPI OData from SAP Datasphere in Node.js – Access Token Returns Login Link Inste
entry.content:
Hello, community!

I’m working on a project where I need to consume data from SAP Datasphere via OData using OpenAPI in Node.js. I've already set up an application to obtain credentials, successfully made the authentication request, and retrieved the access token.

The issue now is that when I use the access token to pull the data, instead of receiving the JSON data as expected, I get a login link in the response. I've double-checked the request structure and authentication configurations, but I still can't resolve this issue.

Has anyone encountered this before or could suggest any necessary adjustments to get the API to return data in JSON format?

Any guidance or practical examples would be greatly appreciated!

Code:

const { executeHttpRequest } = require('@sap-cloud-sdk/core');
const axios = require('axios');

async function getAccessToken(clientId, clientSecret) {
    const tokenUrl = 'https://url_url_url.authentication.us10.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/token'; // URL de token correta
    const response = await axios.post(tokenUrl,
      new URLSearchParams({
        client_id: clientId,
        client_secret: clientSecret,
        grant_type: 'client_credentials'
      }),
      {
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' }
      }
    );
    return response.data.access_token;
  }
 
  async function executeRequest(accessToken) {
    const response = await axios.get(
      'https://url_url_url.us10.hcs.cloud.sap/api/v1/dwc/consumption/analytical/DW_NEL/AM_MOV_V5/AM_MOV_V5',
      {
        headers: {
          Authorization: `Bearer ${accessToken}`
        }
      }
    );
    console.log(response.data);
  }

(async () => {
  try {
    const accessToken = await getAccessToken('Client ID', 'Client Secret');
    await executeRequest(accessToken);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Erro na execução da API:', error);
  }
})();


RETURN:
<html><head><link rel="shortcut icon" href="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7" /><script>document.cookie="fragmentAfterLogin="+encodeURIComponent(location.hash)+";path=/;Secure;SameSite=None";document.cookie="locationAfterLogin="+encodeURIComponent(location.href.split('#')[0].substring(location.href.split('#')[0].indexOf(location.host) + location.host.length))+";path=/;Secure;SameSite=None";document.cookie="signature=J3wPRHL%2FOV5vrzdIeTdo1n2w9%2F8%3D;path=/;Secure;SameSite=None";location="https://url_url_url.authentication.us10.hana.ondemand.com/oauth/authorize?response_type=code&client_id=sb-approuter-sac-sacus10!t655&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Furl_url_url.us10.hcs.cloud.sap%2Fsso%2Flogin%2Fcallback&state=b9df485-5eb-46ed-9bb3-302bd2264"</script></head></html>

entry.title: SSO Azure AD unauthorized issue
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I would like to set up SSO from Azure AD in my Datasphere.

I have set up everything from the Identity Provider (Azure AD) side.
and also have set everything in Datasphere.

But whenever I get to "Step 4: Confirm that the mapping is working."

I open the link in a new incognito tab and I sign in with SSO normally but then I get unauthorized.
which tells me that the SSO works but I still need authorization.

Can you please direct me the way I can solve this?

Best

Sam

tcodataspherefree.eu10.hcs.cloud.sap

entry.title: Level Based Hierarchy description not working on lower level
entry.content:
Hello community,

I am currently working with a Custom Customer hierarchy, and I am facing a strange thing when using it.

I have built a level-based hierarchy dimension, and I am using it via an association with my fact view.

When I am previewing the data in the analytic model or in SAC I have a strange bug. When using the Customer dimension without the hierarchy (flat presentation) I have the customer ID and Description working fine. 

If I select the hierarchy, I now loose the description for the customer but it's still working for the other level of the hierarchy. Only the description from the last level is lost, so in my case, I loose the customer description. It now show the ID in the description.

Do any of you have seen something like that?

Thanks

entry.title: How can we analyzing sql view execution in SAP Datasphere?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

We have a SQL View in Datasphere and we import the output of this SQL View to an Import Model in SAC. We have done some work on SQL View. After this work, the duration of the related job of this Import Model in SAC has increased a lot. We want to analyze this. Is there a feature similar to Plan Visualizer in Eclipse in Datasphere or Database Explorer?

entry.title: Inquiry about issues stopping replication flow.
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I have been facing an issue with a replication flow that I have been trying to stop for a week, but without success. I would like to know if anyone has experienced something similar and could help me understand the possible causes of this problem.

I have tried several solutions, but the flow remains active. Could you suggest what else I might check or if there are any specific steps I should follow to resolve this issue?

I appreciate any guidance or advice you can offer.

Best regards

entry.title: Datasphere repeat business unit for all dates
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to achieve below scenario in target view, new records should be created for each date for each business unit. So target view should have record for each date and business unit combination. There are other dimensions as well which should not be considered for combination.

 

Regards,

VK

entry.title: SAP Datasphere - how to externally trigger replication/data flow
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We wanted to trigger Replication flow or Data flow externally via API call through a different scheduling tool (that runs other jobs in the client landscape).
Datasphere has its own scheduling and monitoring tool but we wanted to leverage the current client scheduling tool to run and monitor the flows. Is there a way to do this?

Thanks,

entry.title: Copy widgets or pages between Stories when using aDatasphere Live Connection
entry.content:
Hello,

I've learned that it is not possible to copy widgets or pages between Stories when using a Datasphere Live Connection.     

Details in this KBA: https://me.sap.com/notes/3128880 

Here is an Influence request that I have created.  

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/334757 

If this is something that you would find useful, please vote! 

Thank you

SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Datasphere

entry.title: SAP Datasphere connection with SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

This is my first post, wish me luck ! 

I am looking for a way to connect SAP Datasphere # and  SAP Commerce Cloud #. We are planning to get data from SAP Commerce Cloud to SAP Datasphere and modeling at SAP Datasphere to report in SAP BusinessObjects WebI.

It seems like a two way to do it;

1-) Create a RESTful API and establish a connection

2-) Connect SAP Commerce Cloud to a MSSQL server and push the Commerce Cloud table data to it and update in a constant periods of time. Then connect the MSSQL server to SAP Datasphere.

Any advice for a third way or any comments on these two ways ?

The Best, Onur

entry.title: Issue with Loading Data Source from SAP S/4HANA ODP to SAP Datasphere via Replication Flow
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am facing an issue while trying to load data from SAP S/4HANA ODP to SAP Datasphere through the Replication Flow. Despite following the steps, no data source appears in the selection screen (as shown in the screenshot).

However, when I attempt to load the same data source using the Remote Table option, the data source (e.g., 2LIS_11_VAHDR) is visible (as shown in the screenshot).

I suspect there might be some configuration or access issue specific to ODP in the replication flow. I would appreciate it if you could share your experiences or insights to resolve this problem.

Thank you for your support!

Best regards,

Priyanka
